generated_oml:
import DTDFVocab from "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"
import base from "http://example.org/base"
instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring heatbed surface temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy in -10 to 85°C range",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn IncubatorEnvironment
]
instance AirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal air temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy in -10 to 85°C range",

    base:isContainedIn IncubatorEnvironment
]
instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring external ambient temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy in -10 to 85°C range",
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn IncubatorEnvironment
]
instance HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]
instance AirTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirTemperatureSensor
]
instance AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor
]
instance HeatbedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature readings from heatbed DS18S20 sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, PythonModelingEnabler
]
instance AirTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature readings from internal air DS18S20 sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirTemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, PythonModelingEnabler
]

    base:desc "Temperature readings from external ambient DS18S20 sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, PythonModelingEnabler
]
instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with parameters C_air and G_box, assuming uniform air temperature and no heatbed heat retention",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, PythonModelingEnabler
]
instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box accounting for heatbed thermal inertia",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler, PythonModelingEnabler
]
instance RabbitMQMessageBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical sensors and virtual DT",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, ModelCalibrationService, SafetyMonitoringService, PredictiveControlService
]
instance ScipyOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy non-linear least squares solver for parameter calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]
instance PythonModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming language for thermal modeling and control logic",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, SafetyMonitoringService, PredictiveControlService
]
instance GitHubRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for open-source code distribution",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, ModelCalibrationService, SafetyMonitoringService, PredictiveControlService
]
instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction via dynamic thermal models",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureTrendPrediction
]

    base:desc "Model calibration using non-linear least squares optimization",

]
instance SafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Safety monitoring for operational deviations",
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalDeviationAlert
]

]

    base:desc "Predicted temperature trends for informed human decision-making"
]
instance OperationalDeviationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for operational deviations from expected thermal behavior"
]

    base:desc "Updated model parameters from calibration process"
]

    base:desc "Adjust heatbed power output based on predictive control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance AdjustFanSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust fan speed for air circulation based on predictive control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed control) are transmitted via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes actuation through MOSFET-based PCB circuitry to regulate thermal output and airflow."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components including RabbitMQ communication server, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models interacting via message-passing architecture, with DT components listening to RabbitMQ messages for real-time synchronization with the physical twin."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated phase (as deployed system), with models integrated post-deployment for ongoing monitoring and control as specified in 'Once the system is deployed, the models used to build it should not be discarded. Instead, they should be integrated into a Digital Twin (DT).'"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions tested via sensor placement experiments (e.g., uniform temperature verification), residual error minimized via Scipy optimization, and model validation against real-world temperature trajectories to ensure predictive accuracy."
]

    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker over TCP/IP network, with Raspberry Pi hosting the broker and components communicating via message queues for data exchange between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [

]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety; no explicit cybersecurity measures or remote operation safety protocols specified for human-adjacent scenarios."
]
